detail.description:
From a debt-ridden nobody to the legendary owner of industries across the universe!
「This Man Is Xiao Shuai 」is a hilarious and heartwarming idle management game where you help Xiao Shuai turn his life around—one step (and one carrot) at a time!
Hire secretaries, upgrade your businesses, automate your income, and watch Xiao Shuai rise from rock bottom to unstoppable success!
Game Features
◆ Secretary Training
Unlock multiple secretary characters—each with charming personalities to grow with you!

inferredReasons.label: 🔍 待深入調查
